bug_report.title: Unauthorized Access and CORS Policy Violation
bug_report.description: The test failed at step 4 due to an assertion that expected a visible element, but encountered a network failure with a status of 401 (Unauthorized). The console logs indicate that the resource at 'https://submit.backtrace.io/UNIVERSE/TOKEN/json' could not be loaded due to CORS policy restrictions, as there is no 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header present. This prevents the application from accessing necessary resources, leading to a critical failure in the test.
bug_report.suggested_fix: Ensure that the server at 'https://submit.backtrace.io' is configured to allow CORS requests from 'https://www.saucedemo.com' and verify that the authentication token is valid to avoid 401 errors.

bug_report.title: Unauthorized Access and CORS Policy Violation
bug_report.description: The test failed at step 4 due to a click action that resulted in a network error 'net::ERR_FAILED'. The console logs indicate multiple 401 Unauthorized responses when attempting to access the resource at 'https://submit.backtrace.io/UNIVERSE/TOKEN/json'. Additionally, there is a CORS policy violation as the response lacks the 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header, preventing the request from being fulfilled.
bug_report.suggested_fix: Ensure that the server at 'https://submit.backtrace.io' is configured to allow requests from 'https://www.saucedemo.com' by adding the appropriate CORS headers. Also, verify that the authentication token is valid and included in the request.

bug_report.title: Unauthorized Access and CORS Policy Violation
bug_report.description: The test failed at step 4 due to a click action that resulted in a network error 'net::ERR_FAILED'. The console logs indicate multiple 401 Unauthorized responses when attempting to access the resource at 'https://submit.backtrace.io/UNIVERSE/TOKEN/json'. Additionally, there is a CORS policy issue as the request was blocked due to the absence of the 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header.
bug_report.suggested_fix: Ensure that the server at 'https://submit.backtrace.io' is configured to allow requests from 'https://www.saucedemo.com' by adding the appropriate CORS headers. Also, verify the authentication credentials being used to avoid 401 Unauthorized errors.

bug_report.title: Unauthorized Access and CORS Policy Violation
bug_report.description: The test failed at step 4 due to a click action that resulted in a network error 'net::ERR_FAILED'. The console logs indicate multiple 401 Unauthorized responses from the server, suggesting that the request is not properly authenticated. Additionally, there is a CORS policy issue where the response lacks the 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header, preventing the resource from being fetched from the specified origin.
bug_report.suggested_fix: Ensure that the authentication token is correctly included in the request headers and verify that the server is configured to allow CORS for the requesting origin.
